2606.26749.title: Structure Before Collapse: Transient semantic geometry in next-token prediction
2606.26749.paper_summary: Neural Collapse predicts that balanced one-hot classification pushes model representations to be equally far from each other; a symmetric configuration that depends only on the output label and ignores any semantic similarity in the inputs. This creates a puzzle: next-token prediction language models are trained predominantly (as context length increases) with one-hot labels: the same context is very unlikely to appear twice in training with different labels. However, they clearly learn latent structural features. That is, despite the one-hot training regime, a language model's contextual embeddings represent the fact that the next word in ''Mary broke the ___'' is likely to be filled by tokens in the latent classes of a) medium-sized, b) rigid, c) inanimate nouns. How does gradient descent find such categorical semantic structure when co-occurrence statistics collapse to one-hot sparsity, eliminating any shared next-tokens among different contexts? To investigate this tension we identify three synthetic controlled settings where inputs have latent semantic factors but are mapped to distinct one-hot labels. We find that semantic geometry emerges early in training, and that representations cluster by shared attributes despite receiving no explicit supervision to do so. This structure is transient: with sufficient capacity and time, the model eventually reaches the predicted symmetric state where all representations are equally separated. We study this phase transition through Gram matrix analysis and propose a preliminary modification to the commonly used unconstrained features model to capture the emergent semantic geometry.
2606.26749.paper_summary_zh: 神經崩潰預測平衡的一熱編碼分類會使模型表示彼此之間的距離相等；這是一種對稱配置，僅依賴於輸出標籤，並忽略輸入中的任何語義相似性。這造成了一個難題：下一個標記預測的語言模型主要是以一熱標籤進行訓練（隨著上下文長度的增加）：相同的上下文在訓練中不太可能以不同的標籤出現兩次。然而，它們顯然學會了潛在的結構特徵。也就是說，儘管採用了單熱訓練制度，語言模型的上下文嵌入表示事實，即在“瑪麗打破了___”中，下一個單詞很可能由潛在類別中的標記填充，這些類別包括 a) 中等大小的，b) 嚴格的，c) 無生命名詞。當共現統計數據崩潰為一熱稀疏，消除了不同上下文之間的任何共享下一個標記時，梯度下降如何找到這樣的類別語義結構？為了研究這種緊張關係，我們確定了三個合成控制設置，其中輸入具有潛在的語義因素，但被映射到不同的一熱標籤。我們發現語義幾何在訓練早期出現，並且儘管沒有明確的監督來這樣做，表示仍然根據共享屬性進行聚類。這種結構是短暫的：隨著足夠的容量和時間，模型最終達到預測的對稱狀態，其中所有表示都被平等地分開。我們通過 Gram 矩陣分析研究這一相變，並提出對常用的無約束特徵模型的初步修改，以捕捉新興的語義幾何。
2606.26749.author: Yize Zhao et.al.
2606.26749.authors: Yize Zhao, Isabel Papadimitriou, Christos Thrampoulidis
